subject: Painting that doesn't leave a punch list
body:
Hi Colin,

Alair runs the franchise model nationally but your Winnipeg jobs still wear the same painting-sub problems: PM chasing for status, dings on freshly hung doors at handoff, schedule slips you find out about too late.

Ashrah Painting fixes all three. Lumia sends auto status to your PM (and answers questions when asked), 6-day delay forecasting, professional cleaning with zero surface damage.

Could I drop our company resume?
cta: Could I drop our company resume?
needs_review_flags: Email spelled 'collin' (two L's) — confirm before send.
